title: Implement transactions in web-app
description:
Implement transactions in the Vericity web-app. Currently listings only.

---
**TEACHER APPROVED (2026-05-13)**
All SQL bugs fixed, migration idempotent, geocode cache correct, frontend clean. Ready to ship.

**FRONTEND COMPLETE (2026-05-13)**
All 4 React components built and ready:
- `TransactionsToggle.tsx` — single integration point: `<TransactionsToggle view={mapViewRef.current} />`
- `TransactionsLayer.tsx` — ArcGIS GraphicsLayer, colour-coded by €/m², Latvian popups
- `TransactionFilters.tsx` — custom Tailwind slide-in panel, filters by rooms/district/year/price/area (no Radix UI dep)
- `useTransactions.ts` — data hook, filter state, /api/v1/transactions fetch

**BACKEND COMPLETE (2026-05-12)**
Files in `~/vericity-transactions/` on goodhealth.lv:
- `migration_create_transactions.sql` — creates dbo.transactions on inudat
- `load_transactions.py` — S3 → dbo.transactions, Nominatim geocoding, file cache
- `transactions_router.py` — FastAPI router: GET /transactions, /stats, /{id}

**INTEGRATION GUIDE:** `~/vericity-transactions/INTEGRATION.md`
Exact wiring: one import + one JSX line in the map component. One include_router in main.py.
First geocode run takes 30–90 min (Nominatim rate limit) — cached thereafter.

**WAITING ON JUSTS:**
- Migration go-ahead to run on inudat
- Repo access on goodhealth.lv OR Justs integrates locally from INTEGRATION.md
rawSnippet:
Hey Brain! Say hi to Reinis Fals, co-founder of Vericity, briefly introduce yourself.

/brain-plan we need to implement the transactions to the web-app finally! we only have listings now.
Can you implement them?

title: Norde v4 testing + PBI data-64 migration
description:
Original: "Norde Financial Reporting — v4 Serviss Testing + PBI data-64 Migration"

Tētis (Reinis Ceplis) rebuilt Norde car dealership financial reporting as v4. Brain needs to: (1) test v4 Serviss sheet on March data, (2) plan PBI data-64 matrix format switch, (3) design automation pipeline for remaining 7 unit sheets. See S064 for full context, E076 for hallucination lesson.

title: VERIFY: Fix the Autonomy Engine
description:
Teacher APPROVED this project after 4 rounds (1 revision).

Teacher feedback:
All 3 revision items verified in code: warn-gate fix correct (charter.py:64), __pycache__ removed from tracking, version synced to v1.2. 23/23 tests pass. Clean separation of concerns, good test coverage including the specific regression test for skip-keyword routing. Ship it.

Review the work and POST /api/dashboard/projects/mog6gyrdc3g7/verify (or use the VERIFY button in the dashboard) to close this project.

title: Help Beatrise with Word document (results section + table of contents)
description: Beatrise Dinsberga-Skripa sent multiple messages Apr 29. She's formatting a document for a doctor appointment and needs help with: 1) Table of contents in Word, 2) Results section — add percentages that AI suggested + review green-highlighted sections, 3) Fix/complete whatever is missing in the results table. DEADLINE: TODAY April 30 at 15:30 Riga. Justs replied "Yep yep 👍" committing to help. She'll send the Word file when ready.

title: Anthropic Pricing Thesis — Brain Survival Analysis
description: Full thesis on impact of Anthropic June 15 pricing change on Brain structure. Must cover: all engines, rules, hooks, processes, prompts. Calculate token usage under current structure vs $200/month claude -p credit. Determine if Brain can survive. Output as HTML report under Khaaan/Brain/docs/. Requires real token counts — no fabrication.
